name: accounting firms processing 5–15 clients/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 5–15 clients/month, manual calculations cause delays in tax reporting. We automate the generation of monthly tax withholding summaries instead of manual calculations and spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Manual generation of tax withholding summaries is time-consuming and error-prone.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual generation of tax withholding summaries is time-consuming and error-prone.
